game_total.diagnosis: Correct environment read; OT and late-game chaos helped final over clear.

tari_eason_rebounds.diagnosis: Miss due to wing rebound role compression and Houston rebound funnel toward Sengun plus Amen.

sengun_rebounds.diagnosis: Correct center-volume read and Houston interior dependency.

lebron_rebounds.diagnosis: Correct playoff-minute and leverage rebound boost.

ayton_rebounds_under.diagnosis: Correct role suppression and matchup funnel read.

sengun.note: Primary Houston rebound anchor. Volume validated the 9+ ladder.

tari_eason.note: Starter/role expectation overvalued; actual rebound pathway compressed by Sengun and Amen.

deandre_ayton.note: Under profile validated through role suppression and matchup context.

game_flow_lineup_context.summary: Lakers won in overtime after late-game chaos. Houston's rebounding concentrated through Sengun and Amen-type jumbo guard/center funnel, suppressing Tari Eason's rebound path. Lakers playoff leverage increased LeBron's defensive glass role while Ayton's board involvement was capped.

model_patch_recommendations.description: Downgrade rebound overs for wing/forward starters when actual rebound funnel is controlled by center plus jumbo guard.
model_patch_recommendations.effect: Reduce wing rebound ladder probability by 3-6% when center/guard funnel is active.

model_patch_recommendations.description: Route Houston board equity toward Sengun and Amen-type jumbo handlers when traditional frontcourt/rotation absences compress rebound distribution.
model_patch_recommendations.effect: Boost Sengun/Amen rebound share; reduce secondary forward board assumptions.

model_patch_recommendations.description: Preserve LeBron playoff-minute leverage rebound boost in close postseason games.
model_patch_recommendations.effect: Maintain elevated LeBron rebound median in high-leverage playoff game states.

model_patch_recommendations.description: Preserve Ayton rebound under profile when opposing center usage is high and Lakers close with smaller or redistributed board groups.
model_patch_recommendations.effect: Continue downgrading Ayton rebound mean/median in similar role contexts.
